MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Prince Hall Apartments is present. Represented by Charles Tillman.
Attorney Charles Tillman Ramsey appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Debra Edgerly is present.
Attorney Ahren C. Hsu-Hoffman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
